title: Vulcano
description: An easy way to simplify the concept of Nether to simple Volcanic Caves.
body:
This simple resource pack replaces the texture of Netherrack with a greyer one, thereby making Nether more similar to Volcanic Caves.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/167cc5bf55c5ec1ec6d89ef1e5ad20edbed01424.png)

_p.s: When creating this resource pack, I was inspired by the Volcanic Zones from the game Subnautica_
